title: Version Config
description: DEPRECATED: Use sdlc-config.schema.json instead. Validates .claude/version.json — controls the version-sdlc skill behaviour.

mode.description: Whether the version is tracked in a file or via git tags.

versionFile.description: Path to the file that stores the version number.

tagPrefix.description: Prefix prepended to git version tags (e.g. "v").

changelog.description: Whether to generate or update a changelog on release.

ticketPrefix.description: Jira ticket prefix used to filter commit messages for the changelog (e.g. "PROJ").
